title: AgentActionManifest
description: A structured declaration of the actions an AI agent may propose, the tools it may use, and the authority, review, reliance, and redaction requirements that apply.

manifest_id.description: Unique identifier for this manifest instance.

agent_name.description: Name of the agent described by this manifest.

owner.description: Team or individual responsible for this agent manifest.

environment.description: Deployment environment this manifest applies to (e.g. development, staging, production).

default_action.description: Manifest-level default posture applied to any action not individually overridden.

allowed.description: Whether the agent is permitted to call this tool.

external_system.description: External system or service that this tool communicates with.

data_classification.description: Data classification level for data handled or returned by this tool.

tools.description: Tools the agent is permitted to call.
